ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to send, Enter for newline

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 的附件设置

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 未安装？请在终端中运行：

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 需要一个介于 0 和 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: error
ast.target: 消息处理期间发生意外错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 收到对未知请求的响应

ast.name: log
ast.target: [Debug] 正在通过useSession启动连接设置...

ast.name: log
ast.target: [ChatPanel] 正在通过configOptions应用配置的模型：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [ChatPanel] 清理：自动导出并关闭会话

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在使用配置开始初始化：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在目录中启动代理进程：

ast.name: log
ast.source: [AcpClient] Agent returned end_turn with no session updates (may be expected for some commands)
ast.target: [AcpClient] 代理返回了end_turn但没有会话更新（对于某些命令可能是预期的）

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在发送会话/取消通知...

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 配置选项已设置。更新后的选项：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to Node.js. Usually leave blank. Only needed if node is in a non-standard location (enter absolute path, e.g. /usr/local/bin/node).
ast.target: Node.js的路径。通常留空。仅当node位于非标准位置时才需要（输入绝对路径，例如 /usr/local/bin/node）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the keyboard shortcut to send messages. Note: If using Cmd/Ctrl+Enter, you may need to remove any hotkeys assigned to Cmd/Ctrl+Enter (Settings → Hotkeys).
ast.target: 选择用于发送消息的键盘快捷键。注意：如果使用Cmd/Ctrl+Enter，您可能需要移除分配给Cmd/Ctrl+Enter的任何热键（设置 → 热键）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the current note in your messages automatically. The agent will have access to its content without typing @notename.
ast.target: 自动在您的消息中包含当前笔记。代理将能够访问其内容，而无需输入@notename。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum characters per mentioned note. Notes longer than this will be truncated.
ast.target: 每个提及笔记的最大字符数。超过此长度的笔记将被截断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum characters for text selection in auto-mention. Selections longer than this will be truncated.
ast.target: 自动提及中文本选择的最大字符数。超过此长度的选择将被截断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to open new chat views
ast.target: 新聊天视图的打开位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display emoji icons in tool calls, thoughts, plans, and terminal blocks.
ast.target: 在工具调用、思考、计划和终端块中显示表情符号图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically collapse diffs that exceed the line threshold.
ast.target: 自动折叠超过行阈值的差异。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Diffs with more lines than this will be collapsed by default.
ast.target: 行数超过此值的差异将默认被折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the floating chat button and draggable chat windows.
ast.target: 启用浮动聊天按钮和可拖动的聊天窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL or path to an image for the floating button. Leave empty for default icon.
ast.target: 浮动按钮的图像URL或路径。留空则使用默认图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically allow all permission requests from agents. ⚠️ Use with caution - this gives agents full access to your system.
ast.target: 自动允许来自代理的所有权限请求。⚠️ 谨慎使用 - 这将给予代理对您系统的完全访问权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show OS notifications when the agent completes a response or requests permission. Notifications are suppressed while Obsidian is focused.
ast.target: 当代理完成响应或请求权限时显示操作系统通知。当Obsidian处于焦点状态时，通知将被抑制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run agents inside Windows Subsystem for Linux. Recommended for agents like Codex that don't work well in native Windows environments.
ast.target: 在Windows Subsystem for Linux中运行代理。推荐用于像Codex这样在原生Windows环境中运行不佳的代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify WSL distribution name (leave empty for default). Example: Ubuntu, Debian
ast.target: 指定WSL发行版名称（留空则使用默认值）。例如：Ubuntu, Debian

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where chat exports will be saved
ast.target: 聊天导出文件的保存文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for exported filenames. Use {date} for date and {time} for time
ast.target: 导出文件名的模板。使用 {date} 表示日期，{time} 表示时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to add to exported notes. Supports nested tags (e.g., projects/agent-client). Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 添加到导出笔记的标签。支持嵌套标签（例如，projects/agent-client）。留空则禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include images in exported markdown files
ast.target: 在导出的Markdown文件中包含图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path for exported images (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 导出图像的文件夹路径（相对于保险库根目录）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically export the current chat when starting a new chat
ast.target: 开始新聊天时自动导出当前聊天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically export the current chat when closing the chat view
ast.target: 关闭聊天视图时自动导出当前聊天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the exported note after exporting
ast.target: 导出后自动打开导出的笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug logging to console. Useful for development and troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试日志。适用于开发和故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which agent is used when opening a new chat view.
ast.target: 选择打开新聊天视图时使用的代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gemini API key. Required if not logging in with a Google account. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: Gemini API密钥。如果未使用Google账户登录则为必需。（以纯文本形式存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to the Gemini CLI. Use just "gemini" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path for a specific version.
ast.target: Gemini CLI的命令名称或路径。仅使用 \"gemini\" 让登录shell解析它，或输入特定版本的绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Leave empty to run without arguments.(Currently, the Gemini CLI requires the "--experimental-acp" option.)
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。留空则不带参数运行。（目前，Gemini CLI需要 \"--experimental-acp\" 选项。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. Required to authenticate with Vertex AI. GEMINI_API_KEY is derived from the field above.(Stored as plain text)
ast.target: 每行输入一个KEY=VALUE对。使用Vertex AI进行身份验证所必需。GEMINI_API_KEY从上面的字段派生。（以纯文本形式存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Anthropic API key. Required if not logging in with an Anthropic account. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: Anthropic API密钥。如果未使用Anthropic账户登录则为必需。（以纯文本形式存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to claude-agent-acp. Use just "claude-agent-acp" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: claude-agent-acp的命令名称或路径。仅使用 \"claude-agent-acp\" 让登录shell解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Leave empty to run without arguments.
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。留空则不带参数运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 每行输入一个KEY=VALUE对。ANTHROPIC_API_KEY从上面的字段派生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OpenAI API key. Required if not logging in with an OpenAI account. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: OpenAI API密钥。如果未使用OpenAI账户登录则为必需。（以纯文本形式存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to codex-acp. Use just "codex-acp" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: codex-acp的命令名称或路径。仅使用 \"codex-acp\" 让登录shell解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. OPENAI_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 输入 KEY=VALUE 对，每行一个。OPENAI_API_KEY 从上方字段派生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unique identifier used to reference this agent.
ast.target: 用于引用此代理的唯一标识符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to the custom agent. Use just the command name to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: 自定义代理的命令名称或路径。仅使用命令名称可让登录 shell 解析，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: 输入 KEY=VALUE 对，每行一个。（以纯文本形式存储）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 留空（登录 shell 自动解析）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 Gemini API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 Anthropic API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 OpenAI API 密钥

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot set config option: no active session
ast.target: 无法设置配置选项：没有活动会话

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot handle permission response: missing onApprovePermission callback
ast.target: 无法处理权限响应：缺少 onApprovePermission 回调

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [VaultService] CodeMirror 6 API not available. Selection change tracking will not work. This may be due to an Obsidian version change.
ast.target: [VaultService] CodeMirror 6 API 不可用。选择更改跟踪将无法工作。这可能是由于 Obsidian 版本更改所致。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [AcpClient] Agent returned end_turn with no session updates — detected error in stderr
ast.target: [AcpClient] 代理返回了 end_turn 且无会话更新 — 在 stderr 中检测到错误

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [Agent Client] 没有可导出的消息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Client] Could not determine file path
ast.target: [Agent Client] 无法确定文件路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Client] This agent does not support image paste. Try drag & drop instead.
ast.target: [Agent Client] 此代理不支持图像粘贴。请尝试拖放。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [Agent Client] 没有活动的权限请求

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [Agent Client] 没有打开的聊天视图

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [Agent Client] 没有要广播的提示

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Client] No other chat views to broadcast to
ast.target: [Agent Client] 没有其他聊天视图可广播到

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Client] No views ready to send
ast.target: [Agent Client] 没有准备好发送的视图

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Client] Cancel broadcast to all views
ast.target: [Agent Client] 取消广播到所有视图

ast.name: message
ast.source: Google is retiring account login for Gemini CLI (Pro/Ultra/free tiers) on June 18, 2026. Google states Gemini CLI stays accessible via a paid Gemini API key — see the guide for setup and privacy notes.
ast.target: Google 将于 2026 年 6 月 18 日停止 Gemini CLI（Pro/Ultra/免费层级）的账户登录。Google 表示，Gemini CLI 仍可通过付费 Gemini API 密钥访问——请参阅指南了解设置和隐私说明。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No active session. Please wait for connection.
ast.target: 没有活动会话。请等待连接。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid value: Expected int32 to be >= -2147483648

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid value: Expected int32 to be <= 2147483647

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid value: Expected uint32 to be <= 4294967295

ast.name: text
ast.source: This only removes the session from this plugin. The session data will remain on the agent side.
ast.target: 这只会从此插件中移除会话。会话数据将保留在代理端。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Start a new chat session with the agent working in the specified directory.
ast.target: 在指定目录中启动一个新的聊天会话，代理将在该目录中工作。
